summary: Iteration 127: Comprehensive testing of Film Popup UX Redesign. All major features verified working: Film cards render correctly with mini step bars, FilmPopup opens on card click with correct per-film step bar based on release_type, URL parameter ?film=<id> auto-opens specific film popup for notification flow, creation form with ReleaseModeSelector works correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - should add DialogDescription for accessibility

action_items: Add DialogDescription to FilmPopup for accessibility (minor)
critical_code_review_comments: FilmPopup.jsx correctly implements per-film step bar with STEPS_IMMEDIATE (5 steps) and STEPS_CS (7 steps)
getCurrentStepId() function correctly determines current step based on film status and release_type
FilmProductionCard.jsx has CardMiniStepBar with correct step configuration for both modes
FilmPipeline.jsx uses useSearchParams to handle ?film=<id> URL parameter for notification flow
NotificationsPage.jsx correctly navigates to /create-film?film=${projectId} for film-related notifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Film Popup UX redesign fully implemented and working. Key features: 1) Film cards with mini step bars in /create-film page, 2) FilmPopup dialog with per-film step bar (5 steps for immediate, 7 for coming_soon), 3) URL parameter ?film=<id> auto-opens specific film popup, 4) Notification click handler navigates to film popup. Test films: 7a50f140-5f11-408c-aa95-78de752b6d57 (Fuoco e Cenere, coming_soon) and 7b6c9535-ba50-4321-ad73-e29769c401e9 (Il Grande Mistero, immediate).

film_production_cards.mini_step_bar: CardMiniStepBar renders correctly with step progress

film_popup_dialog.details: FilmPopup opens on card click with data-testid='film-popup-{id}'

per_film_step_bar.immediate_mode: 5 steps: Proposta → Casting → Script → Produzione → Uscita
per_film_step_bar.coming_soon_mode: 7 steps: Proposta → Poster → Hype → Casting → Script → Produzione → Uscita
per_film_step_bar.current_step_highlight: Correctly highlights based on film status

poster_generation_step.details: PosterStep renders for coming_soon films with AI Auto/AI+Prompt/Stile Classico options

advance_to_casting.details: ProposedAdvanceStep shows 'Prosegui al Casting (2 CP)' button for immediate mode proposed films

url_parameter_film_popup.details: ?film=<id> URL parameter auto-opens specific film popup

nuovo_film_button.details: 'Nuovo Film' button toggles creation form with ReleaseModeSelector

creation_form.details: Multi-step form: Release Mode → Titolo & Genere → Pre-Sceneggiatura → Location

film_list_count.details: 'I TUOI FILM' section with badge showing count (2)

backend_all_endpoint.returns: projects array with id, title, genre, status, release_type, pre_imdb_score
